title: Netify Sink MQTT Configuration
description: JSON Schema for the Netify Sink MQTT Plugin configuration.

host.description: MQTT server hostname or IP address.

port.description: Port used to connect to the MQTT server (typically 1883 for TCP or 8883 for SSL).

user.description: Username used to authenticate with the MQTT server.

pass.description: Password used to authenticate with the MQTT server.

topic.description: Topic to publish messages to. Supports template variables.

message_qos.description: QoS level: 0 (At most once), 1 (At least once), 2 (Exactly once).

message_retain.description: When true, the broker retains the last message on the topic for new subscribers.
